scene_description: A person stands against a plain, solid-colored background, smiling and posing playfully for the camera in a studio setting.

motion_script.action: Stands facing camera, smiles, then turns body slightly to the left while looking at camera.
Turns body back to face forward, continuing to smile.
Shifts weight, tilts head up, and playfully kicks left leg forward.
Lowers leg and turns body to the left again, smiling at the camera.

composition_notes: Static camera, full-body shot with the subject centered against a plain, solid-color backdrop. There is ample headroom and space below the feet.

style.color_treatment: soft pastels with a warm, creamy undertone

shot_backgrounds: A seamless, solid-color studio backdrop in a light beige or tan color.
